concerns: Step 7 test assertions overlap significantly with existing tests/us-003/static-deploy.test.ts (which already asserts build exits 0, dist/index.html exists, and dist/assets/ contents). The new US-035 test should focus on what US-003 does NOT cover — specifically the 'no raw /src/ references' and 'hashed asset references' checks — rather than duplicating build-exit and dist-existence assertions. Consider importing or deferring to the US-003 suite for shared concerns.

The risk note claims 'exclusion patterns only match us-001 and us-002' — confirmed correct, but worth noting explicitly in the test file header so future maintainers know the test is intentionally included.

html2canvas is indeed in devDependencies. The plan correctly notes Vite bundles it regardless, but if the project ever moves to a build tool that respects the dev/prod distinction, this will break at runtime. Consider moving it to dependencies as a follow-up outside this ticket's scope.
